keyPoints: Master the full app lifecycle: planning, development, deployment, and maintenance.
Proficiently use modern development tools, frameworks, and debugging techniques.
Implement core features like UI/UX, data storage, APIs, and security.
commonMistakes: Neglecting cross-platform testing on different devices and OS versions.
Overlooking performance optimization, leading to slow, battery-draining apps.
Implementing weak security practices, leaving user data vulnerable.
